meta.editorNote: 今日 AI 领域重点关注：19 个大模型相关更新、10 项产品发布、6 个开发工具更新。

items.title: Before quantum computing arrives, this startup wants enterprises already running on it
items.summary: After selling his AI startup to AMD for $665 million, Peter Sarlin is back with QuTwo, a new venture building the infrastructure it believes enterprises will need when quantum computing finally arrives.

items.title: Truecaller now lets you hang up on scammers — on behalf of your family
items.summary: Caller identity platform Truecaller recently launched a new feature that lets one person become an admin of a family group, get alerts about fraud calls received by other members, and even end a call on their behalf if they suspect a family member might get scammed. The company,...

items.title: Build an Agent That Thinks Like a Data Scientist: How We Hit #1 on DABStep with Reusable Tool Generation
How to watch Jensen Huang’s Nvidia GTC 2026 keynote
items.summary: GTC — which stands for GPU Technology Conference — is Nvidia's flagship annual event, where the chipmaker typically uses the spotlight to announce new products, champion partnerships, and lay out its vision for the future of computing. Huang's keynote will focus on Nvidia's role...

items.title: Sales automation startup Rox AI hits $1.2B valuation, sources say
items.summary: Rox, founded in 2024 by the former chief growth officer of New Relic, offers an AI-native alternative to CRM tools.

items.title: Can AI help predict which heart-failure patients will worsen within a year?
items.summary: Characterized by weakened or damaged heart musculature, heart failure results in the gradual buildup of fluid in a patient’s lungs, legs, feet, and other parts of the body. The condition is chronic and incurable, often leading to arrhythmias or sudden cardiac arrest. For many cen...

items.title: Facebook Marketplace now lets Meta AI respond to buyers’ messages
items.summary: When buyers inquire about an item’s availability, sellers can use Meta AI to automatically draft replies using information from their listing, such as the description, availability, pickup location, and price.

items.title: Tinder tries to lure people back to online dating with IRL events, virtual speed dating
items.summary: Tinder just got a major revamp as it attempts to reengage its user base and attract younger daters. This includes in-person events, AI enhancements, and even virtual speed dating.

items.title: Atlassian follows Block’s footsteps and cuts staff in the name of AI
items.summary: Atlassian laid off 10% of its workforce, around 1,600 people, as the company looks to funnel more funds to AI.

items.title: Bumble introduces an AI dating assistant, ‘Bee’
items.summary: Bumble's new AI assistant Bee will move the dating app beyond the swipe by matching people based on compatibility and goals.

items.title: A writer is suing Grammarly for turning her and other authors into ‘AI editors’ without consent
items.summary: Journalist Julia Angwin is leading a class action lawsuit against Grammarly for violating her privacy and publicity rights.

items.title: Gumloop lands $50M from Benchmark to turn every employee into an AI agent builder
items.summary: As companies race to adopt AI, Benchmark general partner Everett Randle believes the key to success lies in empowering every worker with AI superpowers, and Gumloop’s intuitive agent builder is an example of the kind of tool that will unlock that potential.

items.title: Alexa+ gets a new ‘adults only’ personality option that curses but won’t do NSFW content
items.summary: The new Sassy style can curse and roast you, but the fun ends there.

items.title: Wonderful raises $150M Series B at $2B valuation
items.summary: The funding round, led by Insight Partners, comes just four months after Wonderful raised a $100 million Series A.

items.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
items.summary: A new Google AI initiative aims to improve heart health outcomes for people living in remote Australian communities.

items.title: Google is using old news reports and AI to predict flash floods
items.summary: A new way to solve data scarcity: Turning qualitative reports into quantitative data with an LLM.

items.title: Google Maps is getting an AI ‘Ask Maps’ feature and upgraded ‘immersive’ navigation
items.summary: The tech giant says the "Immersive Navigation" launch is the biggest update to Maps in over a decade.

items.title: AI ‘actor’ Tilly Norwood put out the worst song I’ve ever heard
items.summary: This song is an AI actor's rallying cry to other AI actors, urging them to keep going despite the naysayers who doubt their humanity. Literally no one can relate to this.

items.title: Ford’s new AI assistant will help fleet owners know if seatbelts are being used
items.summary: Ford Pro AI debuted at Work Truck Week in Indianapolis and is now available to all of its U.S.-based Pro telematics subscribers.

items.title: Zendesk acquires agentic customer service startup Forethought
items.summary: Forethought was years ahead of its time and the 2018 winner of TechCrunch Battlefield.

items.title: Netflix may have paid $600 million for Ben Affleck’s AI startup
items.summary: This deal could rank as among the streaming giant's largest acquisitions ever.

items.title: Lovable says it added $100M in revenue last month alone, with just 146 employees
items.summary: Swedish vibe-coding unicorn Lovable crossed $400 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) in February.

items.title: Replit snags $9B valuation 6 months after hitting $3B
items.summary: Replit raised a new $400 million round and said it hopes to have $1B in ARR by year's end.

items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.

items.summary: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.

items.summary: Google didn't waste time integrating Gemini into its popular Workspace apps, but those AI features are now getting an overhaul. The company says its new Gemini features for Drive, Docs, Sheets, and Slides will save you from the tyranny of the blank page by doing the hard work for...

items.summary: ChatGPT introduces interactive visual explanations for math and science, helping students explore formulas, variables, and concepts in real time.

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.

items.title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
